fields.Name: NavigateToApp
fields.Description: Navigate the user to a specific application and optionally a specific nav item within it. Use this when the user asks to go to a specific area of the system (e.g., 'take me to the Data Explorer' or 'show me my queries').
fields.InputSchemaJSON: {"type":"object","properties":{"AppName":{"type":"string","description":"The application name to navigate to (e.g., 'Data Explorer', 'Chat', 'Knowledge Hub')"},"NavItemName":{"type":"string","description":"Optional: the specific nav item/tab within the app (e.g., 'Queries', 'Conversations', 'Collections')"}},"required":["AppName"]}

fields.Name: NavigateToRecord
fields.Description: Open a specific entity record in a new tab for the user to view or edit. Use when the user wants to see a particular record.

fields.Name: SwitchDashboardTab
fields.Description: Switch the active tab in the current application dashboard. Use when the user asks to see a different section of the current app.
fields.InputSchemaJSON: {"type":"object","properties":{"TabName":{"type":"string","description":"The tab/nav item name to switch to"}},"required":["TabName"]}

fields.Name: ShowSearchResults
fields.Description: Navigate to the Knowledge Hub search tab and execute a search query. Use when the user wants to search across all data sources.

fields.Name: Sleep
fields.Description: Wait for a specified number of seconds before continuing. Use when the user asks to pause, wait, or delay between actions (e.g., 'wait 5 seconds then do X').

fields.Name: OpenBrowserTab
fields.Description: Open a URL in a new browser tab. Use when the user asks to visit an external website, view documentation, or open any URL outside the current application.
fields.InputSchemaJSON: {"type":"object","properties":{"URL":{"type":"string","description":"The full URL to open (must start with http:// or https://)"},"Label":{"type":"string","description":"Optional descriptive label for the tab"}},"required":["URL"]}
